data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of group booking with an attendee list, but the evidence does not provide clear confirmation that the system accurately reflects each participant's timezone in the displayed times. While the linked use case indicates that the system stores participant timezones, there is no direct evidence demonstrating that the displayed times are adjusted accordingly. This lack of explicit evidence leads to an inconclusive validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that all displayed times are shown in the respective timezones of all participants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate timezone display for participants
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that times are displayed in the timezone of each participant.
